ddt:Target.Name: INE-RSA00_9000_373_11b_v6r7d
ddt:Target.Description:
Motorisation : Eu6d Temp -------------------------------------------------------- Init. Author : V. MOREAU Update Author : S.GOUSSI -------------------------------------------------------- - 07/2016 : Creation of DDT Base. - Temporary DDT base for B1_41 (303) SW > Allow Only Read / Erase DTC > Without Fault Type doc > For detail report to excel File
- 09/2016: Update of DDT Base >Corresponds to B220 software
- 12/10/16 VM Tmp Comment to be del > Function code mod D2 > D3 (211)
- 19/12/2016: Update of DDT xml Base >Corresponds to B230 software (and SW321)
- 24/01/2017: Update of DDT xml Base >Change conversion of DID 2001- 2002 - 2004 - 2005
- 09/02/2017: v3r1 > Update to correct DID F188 name : vehicleManufacturerECUSoftwareNumber instead of Configuration file reference link > Add Data OutputPermanentControlList and OutputControlCommand and Request OutputControl
- 20/02/2017 : v3r1a - Project Update (VM) > Add of P32, HFE, X67, X92 vehicles > Add of SW322 in Auto ident field
-02/03/2017: v3r1b - PO update (SG) > change DID DTCFailyreType size : 8 bits instead of 16 bits > Change Cntinental DIDs conversion formula
-07/03/2017: v4r0 - PO update (SG) >Corresponds to B240 Software (330)
-15/05/2017: v4r1 - PO update (SG) >Corresponds to B240 Software (33x) Diag version : change 1->10 Routine results integer-> list
-17/05/2017: v5r0 - PO update (SG) >Corresponds to C20 Software (34x) Add 6 DIDs Add 3 DTCs, change 2 DTCs Change Report snapshot generic request 190400000001 ==>1904000000FF
-17/05/2017: v5r1 - PO update (SG) >Update of auto ident : A00, B00
-28/06/2017: v5r2 - PO update (SG) >Update to: - add DID $FE12, - add StartRoutineByID_BootSpecificBlockSize_STMin : 3101 02FF 30 - add OBD services 01, 02, 03, 04, 07, 09, 0A - add services $1101, $1102 - add vehicles x62PH2, xFF
- 27/09/2017: v5r3 - PO update (SG) -Update routine Request Control FEB0 (4 Bytes instead of 2) -Add Auto Ident 341 - Update DID FE60 and FE67. - Update 1906 service. - Correct Extended data decoding issue - VM add (5/10/17) - 202D/00 - failure description comment correction - Remove services 2701 and 2702 from mainteanability report.
16/11/2017: v6r0 - PO update (SG) - Change Diag Version in "parameters" : from $0A to $10 and to $01 for SW330,331 and A00. - Add DID FD94, FD95, F111, F121. - change data type of DID $FE59 to 64 bytes Hexa. - change data type of DID $FE58 and $FE59 to 2 Hex. - Add Screen OBD at VM (RSA) request. - Remove projects xJA and xJB at at VM (RSA) request. - DID pression FE17 FE18 FE2A FE33 FE36 FE37 FDD4 FEAA corrigés en unsigned (ald signed) - the Data "Routine result" les valeurs 30,31,32 en hexa ald decimal
10/01/2018: v6r1 - RSA update (VM) - Add SW C00, 361, D00 in auto ident field - add of HFEph2, xJK in vehicle applicability
11/01/2018: v6r2 - PO update (SG) - Change Data FDE3: Factor A=0.25 ald 0.4. - add FE60_bit 0 --> bit 13 and change Request $22FE60 received : bit mask.
12/04/2018: v6r3 - PO update (SG) - Add Version 363 and E00 to Auto-identification. - Add DID F111 and F121 and respective read requests. - Add $090F to read certification number and respective screen (OBD/identification)
20/06/2018: v6r4 - RSA update (VM) - Add SW E01, 364, in auto ident field - Final correction on DAIMLER DID F121 - Final correction on requests using PID $04/$0F, DID F80F, F804, F80A - Final correction of errors with new checker V1.8.0 - Screen IUPR optimisation
19/10/2018: v6r5 - RSA update (VM) - Add SW F00, 370, in auto ident field - Add DAMLER Identification screen
14/02/2019: v6r6 (SGO) - Change size DID F41F: 4 Hex-->2 Hex. - Add ident F0B.
11/07/2019 : v6r7 (JTC) - Add SW F01 ident -Add DID FD96-FD97-FD98-FD99-FD9A-FD9B-FD9C-FD9D-FD9E-FD9F-FD6A-FD6B-FD6C-FD6D-FD6E-FD6F
22/10/2019 : v6r7c to v6r7d -Add VS10

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter_2
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCFirstAppearMileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Reductant Injection Valve Control Bank 1 Unit 1
Internal Control Module Monitoring Processor Performance
Invalid Data Received From ECM/PCM "A" No MIL
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: Boot Specific Block Size and STMin
Signal activating the flow rate service mode
Signal activating the anti-sticking routine control
Signal requesting a noizing test routine control
First filling of urea routine control
First filling of urea end of line routine control

Data.Name: Vehicle manufacturer spare part number N
Vehicle manufacturer kit aseembly part number
Exhaust regulation or type approval number data identifier
Data.Comment: "Exhaust regulation or type approval number data identifier"

Data.Name: Reset non expected ECU reset detection stored in the NVM
Data.Comment: "Reset non expected ECU reset detection stored in the NVM"

Data.Name: Reset scaling factor of the leak detection residue generator stored in the NVRAM
Data.Comment: "Reset scaling factor of the leak detection residue generator stored in the NVRAM"

Data.Name: Reset last value of the modelized urea level used for the level sensor plausibility check
Data.Comment: "Reset last value of the modelized urea level used for the level sensor plausibility check"

Data.Name: Reset last value of the state of the level measure from the NVM
Data.Comment: "Reset last value of the state of the level measure from the NVM"

Data.Name: Reset last value of the state of the level measure after qualification from the NVM
Data.Comment: "Reset last value of the state of the level measure after qualification from the NVM"

Data.Name: Reset number of recalibration done by the leak detection stored in the NVRAM
Data.Comment: "Reset number of recalibration done by the leak detection stored in the NVRAM"

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: Name and address information of the supplier.

Data.Name: Urea injector flow rate request from the vehicle
Data.Comment: Urea injector flow rate request from the vehicle

Data.Name: Urea injector upstream temperature from the vehicle
Data.Comment: Urea injector upstream temperature from the vehicle

Data.Name: Tank urea slosh state detection state
Data.Comment: Tank urea slosh state detection state

Data.Name: Zero consumption Pump speed computed by the leak detection algorithm
Data.Comment: Zero consumption Pump speed computed by the leak detection algorithm

Data.Name: Urea state from Maximum Flow Rate function
Data.Comment: Urea state from Maximum Flow Rate function

Data.Name: Reset the hardware and watchdog number of rest counter
Data.Comment: "Reset the hardware and watchdog number of rest counter"

Data.Name: Tank heater current when PWM is ON
Data.Comment: Tank heater current when PWM is ON

Data.Name: Tank heater high side voltage when PWM is ON
Data.Comment: Tank heater high side voltage when PWM is ON

Data.Name: Signal indicating the selected pump task
Data.Comment: Signal indicating the selected pump task

Item.Text: The maximal time to activate the function is reached
The minimal time between two activation is not reached
Unable to increase or stabilize the pressure

Data.Name: Reference temperature for tank urea temperature sensor diagnostique
Data.Comment: Reference temperature for tank urea temperature sensor diagnostique

Data.Name: Reset measured urea volume stored in the NVM
Data.Comment: "Reset measured urea volume stored in the NVM"

Data.Name: Reset urea volume stored in the NVM
Data.Comment: "Reset urea volume stored in the NVM"

Data.Name: Reset pump speed at the recalibration of the leak detection stored in the NVRAM
Data.Comment: "Reset pump speed at the recalibration of the leak detection stored in the NVRAM"

Data.Name: Reset zero consumption Pump speed computed by the consumption monitoring algorithm stored in the nonvolatile memory
Data.Comment: "Reset zero consumption Pump speed computed by the consumption monitoring algorithm stored in the n

Data.Name: Reset cumulated flow rate injected volume stored in the NVM in the previous driving cycle.
Data.Comment: "Reset cumulated flow rate injected volume stored in the NVM in the previous driving cycle."

Data.Name: Reset temperature at the recalibration of the leak detection stored in the NVRAM
Data.Comment: "Reset temperature at the recalibration of the leak detection stored in the NVRAM"

Data.Name: Reset system defrosting remaining time stored in the NVM in the previous driving cycle
Data.Comment: "Reset system defrosting remaining time stored in the NVM in the previous driving cycle."

Item.Text: Signal activating the flow rate service mode
Signal activating the anti-sticking service mode

Data.Name: Tank Heating Duty Cycle Command
Data.Comment: Tank Heating Duty Cycle Command (between 0 and 1)

Data.Name: Heating power limitation from the vehicle.
Data.Comment: Heating power limitation from the vehicle.

Data.Name: Line heater high side voltage when PWM is ON
Data.Comment: Line heater high side voltage when PWM is ON

Data.Name: Line heater current when PWM is ON
Data.Comment: Line heater current when PWM is ON

Data.Name: Number of recalibration done by the leak detection
Data.Comment: Number of recalibration done by the leak detection

Data.Name: Estimated pressure loss from the Pressure sensor to the injector
Data.Comment: Estimated pressure loss from the Pressure sensor to the injector

Data.Name: Number of hardware reset stored in NVM
Data.Comment: Number of hardware reset stored in NVM

Data.Name: Injector anti sticking routine return result
Data.Comment: Injector anti sticking routine return result

Data.Name: Pumping rotor stall test routine return result
Data.Comment: Pumping rotor stall test routine return result

Data.Name: PID_02_DTC_CAUSD_FRZ_FRM_DATA_STORG
Data.Comment: Dtc That Caused Required Freeze Frame Data Storage

Data.Name: PID_21_MILG_WTH_MIL_ACTVD
Data.Comment: Distance Traveled While Mil is Activated

Data.Name: PID_30_NB_OF_WRM_UP_SINC_DTC_CLRD
Data.Comment: Number of warm-ups since Dtc Cleared

Data.Name: Anti sticking heating counter measure active time reset
Data.Comment: Anti sticking heating counter measure active time reset

Data.Name: Current version of the dataset parameter
Command signal for motor drive block
Data.Comment: Command signal for motor drive block

Data.Name: Current status of the pumping afterrun manager
Data.Comment: Current status of the pumping afterrun manager

Data.Name: Current status of the pumping priming manager
Data.Comment: Current status of the pumping priming manager

Data.Name: Current status of the pumping run manager
Data.Comment: Current status of the pumping run manager

Data.Name: Current status of the pumping startup manager
Data.Comment: Current status of the pumping startup manager

Data.Name: Arbitrated control mode for the pump pressure control
Data.Comment: Arbitrated control mode for the pump pressure control

Data.Name: CTL_TANK_HEATR_DU_CY
Data.Comment: Tank Heater 1 duty cycle activation (between 0 and 1)

Data.Name: CTL_LINE_HEATR_DU_CY
Data.Comment: Line Heater 1 duty cycle activation (between 0 and 1)

Data.Name: Signal that corresponds to the arbitrated speed setpoint
Data.Comment: Signal that corresponds to the arbitrated speed set-point

Data.Name: Gas pressure at the injector nozzle
Data.Comment: Gas pressure at the injector's nozzle

Data.Name: Vehicle heating stop and start request
Number of watchdog reset stored in NVM
Data.Comment: Number of watchdog reset stored in NVM

Data.Name: Cause and milage of reset in NVM
Data.Comment: Cause and milage of reset in NVM

Data.Name: Zero consumption Pump speed computed by the consumption monitoring algorithm
Data.Comment: Zero consumption Pump speed computed by the consumption monitoring algorithm

Data.Name: Variance of the pump speed value of all the recalibration done by the leak detection algorithm
Data.Comment: Variance of the pump speed value of all the recalibration done by the leak detection algorithm

Item.Text: First filling of urea end of line

Data.Name: DID_UREA_INJR_CUR_DU_CY
Data.Comment: Active duty cycle to control the reducing agent injector

Data.Name: DID_UREA_INJR_FLOW_RATE_REQ_BK_1
Data.Comment: Target massflow of reducing agent through injector for cylinder bank 1

Data.Name: DID_UREA_INJR_FLOW_RATE_LIM_MAX
Data.Comment: Maximum allowed reducing agent mass flow for dosing

Data.Name: DID_SYS_UREA_INJ_AUTHN
Data.Comment: Flag which indicates all enabling conditions for reducing agent injection

Data.Name: DID_UREA_INJR_PIN_CBL_R_ADPT_ACTV
Data.Comment: Reducing agent injector PIN and cable resistance adaption is active

Data.Name: DID_UREA_INJR_PIN_CBL_R_ADPT_FINSHD
Data.Comment: Reducing agent injector PIN and cable resistance adaption is finished

Data.Name: DID_SYS_ENG_RSTRT_REQ
Data.Comment: Logical variable indicating engine (re)start request from SCR

Data.Name: DID_UREA_INJR_DI_STT_REQ
Data.Comment: Logical variable indicating request for engine-stop inhibition from SCR

Data.Name: DID_UREA_INJR_AFT_RUN_COG_TI
Data.Comment: Safeguard delay to release the power latch

Data.Name: DID_UREA_INJR_COG_PMP_PWR_LTCH_EXTD_TI_REQ
Data.Comment: Powerlatch enlargement for reducing dosing unit protection by cooling pump

Data.Name: DID_UREA_INJR_HI_SIDE_U
Data.Comment: Reducing agent supply voltage from acquisition

Data.Name: DID_UREA_INJR_ASA_ENA_CDN
Data.Comment: "Engine Running in idle speed Engine not running Ignition Key On Battery ok Reserved Reserved

Data.Name: DID_UREA_INJR_NEW_TEST_EXT_REQ
Data.Comment: Reset of injector NVM variables in case of injector replacement

Data.Name: DID_SRV_MOD_UREA_INJ_FLOW_RATE_CTL_RTN_RES
Data.Comment: "Current state of the reducing agent injector performance test

Data.Name: DID_LO_BYTE_OF_ID_SUPPORTED_20
Data.Comment: Low byte of identifier supporter for 20xx

Data.Name: DID_LO_BYTE_OF_ID_SUPPORTED_F0
Data.Comment: Low byte of identifier supporter for F0xx

Data.Name: DID_LO_BYTE_OF_ID_SUPPORTED_F1
Data.Comment: Low byte of identifier supporter for F1xx

Data.Name: DID_LO_BYTE_OF_ID_SUPPORTED_FD
Data.Comment: Low byte of identifier supporter for FDxx

Data.Name: DID_LO_BYTE_OF_ID_SUPPORTED_FE
Data.Comment: Low byte of identifier supporter for FExx

Data.Name: Raw value of the reducing agent injector PIN and cable resistance
Injector protection in case of high exhaust gas T° for SCR interface
Duty cycle request for the reducing agent injector
Measured reducing agent injector coil temperature
Measured current feedback of the injector
Data.Comment: Measured current feedback of reducing agent injector

Data.Name: Reset the urea quality estimation value stored in the NVM
Data.Comment: "Reset the urea quality estimation value stored in the NVM"

Data.Name: State of the detection of the level measure after qualification
DID_SRV_MOD_UREA_INJR_ANTI_STICKG_RTN_RES
Data.Comment: Current state of the reducing agent injector anti sticking test

Data.Name: DID_FIRST_FILG_OF_UREA_RTN_RES
Data.Comment: First filling of urea routine return result

Data.Name: DID_ELECL_CHK_RTN_RES
Data.Comment: Actuator electrical check routine return result

Item.Text: Tank Heater + Line heater electrical error
TankHeatr + LineHeatr + Pump + UreaInjr electrical error

Data.Name: Frequency of the PWM controlling the injector
Flowrate setpoint through injector including all setpoint interventions
Injector PIN and cable resistance adaptation status
DID_SRV_MOD_UREA_INJR_NOIZ_RTN_RES
Data.Comment: "Current state of the reducing agent injector noise test

Data.Name: DID_PMP_OUTL_UREA_P_HW_MIN
Data.Comment: Min pump outlet urea pressure measurement after ADC conversion

Data.Name: DID_PMP_OUTL_UREA_P_HW_MAX
Data.Comment: Max pump outlet urea pressure measurement after ADC conversion

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifier_0x02FF
Data.Comment: Boot Specific Block Size and STMin

Item.Text: Boot Specific Block Size and STMin

Data.Name: Average of the pump speed value of all the recalibration done by the leak detection algorithm
Data.Comment: Average of the pump speed value of all the recalibration done by the leak detection algorithm

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.LastOccurenceMileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: SrvModNrc.Bit 11_ Exhaust gas temperature too high
SrvModNrc.Bit 13_ Unable to increase or stabilize the pressure
Data.Comment: Unable to increase or stabilize the pressure

Data.Name: SrvModNrc.Bit 2_ Permanent Power supply too low
SrvModNrc.Bit 3_ Heater Power supply too low
SrvModNrc.Bit 4_ The maximal time to activate the function is reached
Data.Comment: The maximal time to activate the function is reached

Data.Name: SrvModNrc.Bit 5_ The minimal time between two activation is not reached
Data.Comment: The minimal time between two activation is not reached

Data.Name: SrvModNrc.Bit 6_ The sub-system is already activated
SrvModNrc.Bit 9_ Tank temperature too low (frozen urea)
Reset average of the pump speed value of all the recalibration done by the leak detection algo stored in the NVRAM
Data.Comment: "Reset average of the pump speed value of all the recalibration done by the leak detection algorithm

Data.Name: Reset variance of the pump speed value of all the recalibration done by the leak detection algo stored in the NVRAM
Data.Comment: "Reset variance of the pump speed value of all the recalibration done by the leak detection algorit

Data.Name: DID_MAX_TIME_REC_VLD_SPD.DID_MAX_TIME_REC_VLD_SPD 0
Data.Comment: Max time between 2 recalibrations with valid zero consumption speed 0

Data.Name: DID_MAX_TIME_REC_VLD_SPD.DID_MAX_TIME_REC_VLD_SPD 1
Data.Comment: Max time between 2 recalibrations with valid zero consumption speed 1

Data.Name: DID_MAX_TIME_REC_VLD_SPD.DID_MAX_TIME_REC_VLD_SPD 9
Data.Comment: Max time between 2 recalibrations with valid zero consumption speed 9

Data.Comment: Max time between 2 recalibrations with valid zero consumption speed 8

Data.Comment: Max time between 2 recalibrations with valid zero consumption speed 7

Data.Comment: Max time between 2 recalibrations with valid zero consumption speed 6

Data.Comment: Max time between 2 recalibrations with valid zero consumption speed 5

Data.Comment: Max time between 2 recalibrations with valid zero consumption speed 4

Data.Comment: Max time between 2 recalibrations with valid zero consumption speed 3

Data.Comment: Max time between 2 recalibrations with valid zero consumption speed 2

Data.Comment: Max time between 2 recalibrations with valid zero consumption speed 19

Data.Comment: Max time between 2 recalibrations with valid zero consumption speed 18

Data.Comment: Max time between 2 recalibrations with valid zero consumption speed 17

Data.Name: DID_MAX_TIME_REC_VLD_SPD.DID_MAX_TIME_REC_VLD_SPD 16
Data.Comment: Max time between 2 recalibrations with valid zero consumption speed 16

Data.Comment: Max time between 2 recalibrations with valid zero consumption speed 15

Data.Name: DID_MAX_TIME_REC_VLD_SPD.DID_MAX_TIME_REC_VLD_SPD 14
Data.Comment: Max time between 2 recalibrations with valid zero consumption speed 14

Data.Name: DID_MAX_TIME_REC_VLD_SPD.DID_MAX_TIME_REC_VLD_SPD 13
Data.Comment: Max time between 2 recalibrations with valid zero consumption speed 13

Data.Name: DID_MAX_TIME_REC_VLD_SPD.DID_MAX_TIME_REC_VLD_SPD 12
Data.Comment: Max time between 2 recalibrations with valid zero consumption speed 12

Data.Comment: Max time between 2 recalibrations with valid zero consumption speed 11

Data.Name: DID_MAX_TIME_REC_VLD_SPD.DID_MAX_TIME_REC_VLD_SPD 10
Data.Comment: Max time between 2 recalibrations with valid zero consumption speed 10

Data.Name: DID_MAX_TIME_REC_VLD_SPD_WORST_CASE
Data.Comment: Max time between 2 recalibrations with valid zero consuption speed worst case

Data.Name: DID_SYS_RUN_TIME_WORST_CASE
Data.Comment: Maximum residue System running time worst case

Data.Name: DID_FINAL_UCDM_RES_WORST_CASE
Data.Comment: Final residue during driving worst case

Data.Name: DID_MAX_UCDM_RES_WORST_CASE
Data.Comment: Max residue during driving worst case

Data.Name: DID_MAX_DIFF_REC_WORST_CASE
Data.Comment: Max difference between recalibrations worst case

Data.Name: DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT_WORST_CASE
Data.Comment: Max difference between slow filter and 0 speed worst case

Data.Name: DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT.DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT 0
Data.Comment: Max difference between slow filter and 0 speed 0

Data.Name: DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT.DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT 1
Data.Comment: Max difference between slow filter and 0 speed 1

Data.Comment: Max difference between slow filter and 0 speed 2

Data.Comment: Max difference between slow filter and 0 speed 6

Data.Comment: Max difference between slow filter and 0 speed 7

Data.Name: DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT.DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT 8
Data.Comment: Max difference between slow filter and 0 speed 8

Data.Name: DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT.DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT 9
Data.Comment: Max difference between slow filter and 0 speed 9

Data.Name: DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT.DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT 10
Data.Comment: Max difference between slow filter and 0 speed 10

Data.Name: DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT.DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT 11
Data.Comment: Max difference between slow filter and 0 speed 11

Data.Name: DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT.DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT 12
Data.Comment: Max difference between slow filter and 0 speed 12

Data.Name: DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT.DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT 13
Data.Comment: Max difference between slow filter and 0 speed 13

Data.Name: DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT.DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT 14
Data.Comment: Max difference between slow filter and 0 speed 14

Data.Name: DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT.DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT 15
Data.Comment: Max difference between slow filter and 0 speed 15

Data.Name: DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT.DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT 16
Data.Comment: Max difference between slow filter and 0 speed 16

Data.Name: DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT.DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT 17
Data.Comment: Max difference between slow filter and 0 speed 17

Data.Name: DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT.DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT 18
Data.Comment: Max difference between slow filter and 0 speed 18

Data.Name: DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT.DID_MAX_DIFF_SPD_FILT 19
Data.Comment: Max difference between slow filter and 0 speed 19

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Vehicle manufacturer spare part number R

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter_2
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCFirstAppearMileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: DataRead.Number of hardware reset stored in NVM
Request.Comment: Read Number of hardware reset stored in NVM

DataItem.Name: Number of hardware reset stored in NVM
SrvModNrc.Bit 11_ Exhaust gas temperature too high
SrvModNrc.Bit 13_ Unable to increase or stabilize the pressure
SrvModNrc.Bit 2_ Permanent Power supply too low
SrvModNrc.Bit 3_ Heater Power supply too low
SrvModNrc.Bit 4_ The maximal time to activate the function is reached
SrvModNrc.Bit 5_ The minimal time between two activation is not reached
SrvModNrc.Bit 6_ The sub-system is already activated
SrvModNrc.Bit 9_ Tank temperature too low (frozen urea)

Request.Comment: Max difference between slow filter and 0 speed.

Button.Text: Start Default Session
Start Programming Session
Start Extended Session
Launch Pump with Pressure Setpoint (6.5 bars)
Launch Pump with Speed Setpoint Forward (1500 Rpm)
Stop Pump with Pressure Setpoint
Launch Pump with Speed Setpoint Reverse (-1500 Rpm)
Stop Pump with Speed Setpoint Forward
Stop Pump with Speed Setpoint Reverse
Launch Pump Heating with Power Setpoint (20W)
Stop Pump Heating with Power Setpoint

Display.DataName: Command signal for motor drive block
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Command signal for motor drive block

Button.Text: Launch Line Heater Control with a Power Setpoint (50W)
Launch Line Heater Control with a Line Heating State (Defrost State)
Launch Line Heater Control with a Duty Cycle Setpoint (0,5)
Launch Tank Heater Control with a Power Setpoint (50W)
Launch Tank Heater Control with a Tank Heating State (Defrost State)
Launch Tank Heater Control with a Duty Cycle Setpoint (0,5)
Stop Line Heater Control with a Power Setpoint
Stop Line Heater Control with a Line Heating State
Stop Line Heater Control with a Duty Cycle Setpoint
Stop Tank Heater Control with a Power Setpoint
Stop Tank Heater Control with a Tank Heating State
Stop Tank Heater Control with a Duty Cycle Setpoint

Label.Text: 0=Heating stopped; 1=Heating idle mode; 2=Heating defrost mode; 3=Heating prevent mode

Display.DataName: Vehicle heating stop and start request
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Vehicle heating stop and start request

Label.Text: 0=No misfilled detected; 1=No Misfilled to Misfilled detection; 2=misfilled detected; 3=Misfilled to no Misfilled detection

Launch Electrical Check Routine Control
Stop Urea Injector Flowrate Routine Control

Launch First Filling of Urea Routine Control
Launch First Filling of Urea End Of Line Routine Control
Stop First Filling of Urea Routine Control

Stop Injector AntiSticking Routine Control

Stop Purging Routine Control
